use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers or account menus
Show user avatars alongside comments, reviews, or forum posts
Represent users in chat or messaging application interfaces
Display contact list items with profile images
Show team member avatars in organizational charts or about pages
ai_summary: A lightweight Radix UI-based avatar component with support for images, fallback initials, and rounded styling. Provides accessibility-friendly user representation with proper alt text handling and fallback states for when images fail to load. Commonly used in navigation, user profiles, comments, and contact lists across various application contexts.
